Title: strstr
Description:
strstr performs a
    substring search, returning a zero-based index pointing to
    beginning of first occurrence of sub or
    NULL if not found.
Examples:
strstr('AbracadabrA','abrA')
    -> 7 (Found from the eighth character onwards)
strcasestr('AbracadabrA','abrA')
    -> 0 (Found from the beginning of string)
